\tzpentry{ID5519}{Density Divergence Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5519 introduces Density Divergence Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \rho \, \ddot{\mathbf{u}} = (\lambda+\mu)\nabla(\nabla\cdot\mathbf{u}) + \mu\nabla^2\mathbf{u} + \mathbf{f}_{\mathrm{EM}} + \mathbf{f}_{\mathrm{fold}}, \end{equation}
